title: heterotheca jonesii
intro: Heterotheca jonesii, also known as bitterweed, is a perennial plant native to the south-central regions of North America. It contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heterotheca jonesii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. Heterotheca jonesii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although its use as a medicinal plant is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
